zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Gyle II於大約1590年出生時，他的父親Richard Guild45歲，母親Joan Erbery32歲。他於1607年與Margery Jordan在英國素福爾可維爾比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1623年7月17日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可蕾托 普盧姆斯亞德享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可蕾托 普盧姆斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Gyle II于大约1590年出生时，他的父亲Richard Guild45岁，母亲Joan Erbery32岁。他于1607年与Margery Jordan在英国素福爾可維爾比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1623年7月17日在英国英格兰諾福爾可蕾托 普盧姆斯亞德享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可蕾托 普盧姆斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Gyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gill
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Avtar, Amritpal, Darshan, Hardip, Nirmal, Sohan, Ajit, Balwinder, Charan, Jasvir, Kewal, Navdeep.

English and Scottish: in northern England and Scotland sometimes from Middle English Gille, Old Norse Gilli, which is of Irish (Gaelic) origin (see below), and pronounced with a hard g. As a personal name it is not found after c. 1200.

English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English gille ‘deep glen, ravine’ (Old Norse (Norwegian) gil), pronounced with a hard g. The term is found mainly in northwestern England, where Norwegian Vikings settled.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Gyle II was born about 1590, his father, Richard Guild, was 45 and his mother, Joan Erbery, was 32. He married Margery Jordan in 1607, in Wilby, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 17 July 1623, in Little Plumstead, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Little Plumstead, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Margery Jordan en 1607, à Wilby, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 17 juillet 1623, à Little Plumstead, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Little Plumstead, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lui sposato Margery Jordan nel 1607, nel Wilby, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Richard Gyle IIが約1590年に生まれた時，父Richard Guildは45歳，母Joan Erberyは32歳であった。1607年にイギリススフォルクウィルビーでMargery Jordanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1623年7月17日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクリットル プルムステアドで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクリットル プルムステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 마거릿
ko.Ilketshall St. Margaret, Suffolk, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이케츠홀 스트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Gyle II(이)가 대략 1590년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Guild(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Erbery(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1607년 영국 수폴크 윌비에서 Margery Jordan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1623년 7월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리틀 플럼스테아드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리틀 플럼스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Gyle II nasceu aproximadamente 1590, seu pai, Richard Guild, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Joan Erbery, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Jordan em 1607, em Wilby, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 17 de julho de 1623, em Little Plumstead, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Little Plumstead, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Ilketshall St Margaret, Suffolk, England: илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ilketshall St. Margaret, Suffolk, Englan: илкецхолл ст маргарет, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Gyle II родился около 1590 г., его отцу по имени Richard Guild было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Erbery, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Jordan в 1607 г. в местности уилби, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 17 июля 1623 г. в местности литл плумстид, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности литл плумстид, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Gyle II nació aproximadamente 1590, su papá, Richard Guild, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Joan Erbery, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margery Jordan en 1607, en Wilby, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 17 de julio de 1623, en Little Plumstead, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Little Plumstead, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
